function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request: migrated all 8 listed finance records to schema-compliant YAML frontmatter (invoice/bill) while preserving each original note body verbatim, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap, inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas, used finance schema fields exactly, preserved full original bodies beneath frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from 00_inbox/000_next-task.md requested OCR on 8 specific files. Schema/workflow docs required frontmatter extraction and verbatim body preservation; each target file was read and updated accordingly. Inbox-processing workflow update required removing the inbox item after successful structured-record maintenance, so 00_inbox/000_next-task.md was deleted.
